log.name: floor_sdiv_by_2
log.body:
define i8 @floor_sdiv_by_2(i8 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @floor_sdiv_by_2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[RV:%.*]] = ashr i8 [[X:%.*]], 1
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[RV]]
  %div = sdiv i8 %x, 2
  %and = and i8 %x, -127
  %icmp = icmp eq i8 %and, -127
  %sext = sext i1 %icmp to i8
  %rv = add nsw i8 %div, %sext
  ret i8 %rv
}
